016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc;
017
018/**
019 * Implementations of this interface initiate shutting down the (server) application
020 * that is hosting a {@link JsonRpcService}. It is expected that the server-shutdown process
021 * will in turn call the {@link JsonRpcService#close()} method at a later time.
022 */
023public interface JsonRpcShutdownService {
024    /**
025     * This method will initiate a server shutdown. Implementations MUST not shut down
026     * until after the caller of this method is able to return a response to a client.
027     * @return A shutdown message (e.g. {@code "echod stopping"}) to return to the client.
028     */
029    String stopServer();
030
031    /**
032     * Trivial implementation for simple servers, unit tests, etc.
033     */
034    class NoopShutdownService implements JsonRpcShutdownService {
035        @Override
036        public String stopServer() {
037            return "server stop received (stop behavior is default/undefined)";
038        }
039    }
040}
